prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial begins with a nearly black/dark frame, with no discernible objects visible.

It then cuts to a kitchen counter scene. A large pan or skillet filled with a saucy pasta-and-meat mixture sits in the foreground. Behind it is a white glove-like chef character with a face, red round nose, black mustache, and a floppy chef’s hat. A red pot or kettle and kitchen items are visible in the background.

The next shot is a close-up of an adult man with a mustache eating from a fork. Only part of the fork and food are visible at the edge of the frame as he brings it to his mouth.

The scene returns to the pan on the counter with the glove chef character positioned behind it. The pasta dish fills the lower foreground, while the character’s face and chef hat are clearly visible in the background.

A close-up then shows a young girl eating from a fork. Her face is centered, and she appears to be chewing or tasting the food.

A close-up of the food follows: wide lasagne-like pasta pieces, browned meat, and sauce are shown in detail, with a utensil partly visible at the side.

The glove chef character appears alone on the kitchen counter in a medium shot. The red pot/kettle remains behind it, and a red-and-white checkered cloth is visible to the side.

Another close-up shows the pasta dish from a low angle, emphasizing the glossy sauce, meat, and curled pasta pieces. A utensil appears at the left edge.

The commercial then cuts to a family seated at a dining table. Four people are visible: an adult woman, an adult man with a mustache, a boy, and a younger child. Plates of food are in front of them, along with cups and a small container in the center of the table. They appear to be interacting with one another while eating.

The final frame is a product shot on a red-and-white checkered tablecloth. A box of “Hamburger Helper” is shown beside the glove chef character. Large text above reads “New Zestier Lasagne.” The box also includes visible text such as “For Lasagne,” “Hamburger Helper,” and “Add to 1 lb hamburger,” though some smaller details are not fully readable.
